Bus Timings

Bus 83 Timetable Ghubaiba Bus Station to Al Khail Metro Seaside

December 11, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

So, you know Bus 83 in Dubai? It runs from Ghubaiba Bus Station all the way to Al Khail Metro Seaside. Super handy if you need to get around, you know?

Lots of people rely on it to get where they need to go, whether they’re locals or just visiting. Pretty reliable too, so you’re not left stranded or anything.

Route Name 83
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 17-Al Khail Metro Seaside
Total Distance 15 km
Total Journey Time 45 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 21:34 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 4 to AED 7
Official Website rta. ae (RTA Dubai)

Bus 83 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

From Ghubaiba Bus Station From Al Khail Metro Seaside
05:30 06:38
06:10 07:18
07:10 08:18
07:50 08:58
08:25 09:33
08:59 10:07
09:27 10:35
10:30 11:38
15:26 16:34
16:59 18:07
17:30 18:38
18:00 19:08
18:45 19:53
19:25 20:33
20:26 21:34

Bus 83 Timetable

For the exact timings, refer to the RTA website, or click this link for Bus 83 Timings.

Also See: Abu Dhabi Bus 216: Essential Route and Stops Information

Bus Ticket Price

The ticket price for Bus Route 83 ranges from AED 4 to AED 7, depending on the distance traveled.

Bus Booking

Bus Route 83 can be accessed without the need for advance booking. Passengers can pay using Nol cards or other accepted payment methods. For real-time updates and route information, the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) app and website provide useful resources. While online booking for specific bus rides isn’t available, these platforms can help plan your journey and provide schedule details.

Bus Route

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 17

  2. Raffa

  3. Rolla

  4. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  5. Sharaf DG Metro · 2

  6. Street 7

  7. Street 12A

  8. Street 12A, 2

  9. Center Point

  10. Saeediya School

  11. Karama, 2

  12. Karama

  13. Commercial Center

  14. Schools Health Center

  15. Karama Ent.

  16. Abdulla Omran Taryam Street

  17. Dubai Knowledge Village Block 3

  3. Schlumberger, Dubai Internet City

  4. Infotech, Dubai Internet City

  5. Dubai Media City

  6. Dubai Media City

  7. Dubai Media City, Building 14

  8. International Advertising Association

  9. Infotech, Dubai Internet City

  10. Dubai Internet City, Building 9

  11. Dubai Internet City, Building 8

  12. Dubai Internet City, Building 5

  13. Al Khail Metro Seaside

Read More: Bus F21 Route and Stops in Dubai: All You Need to Know

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus Route 83 in Dubai travels through several areas with notable tourist attractions and destinations:

  1. Dubai Media City: This area is a hub for media and entertainment. It’s home to various media companies and also hosts events and exhibitions. Notable landmarks include the Dubai Media City Amphitheater, which is used for concerts and cultural events.

  2. Dubai Internet City: This tech hub houses numerous IT companies and is a key business district. It also has attractions such as the Dubai Knowledge Village, which offers educational and professional development opportunities.

3.

  1. Sharaf DG Metro Station: Located near the Sharaf DG shopping area, which includes retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment venues.

  2. Karama: Known for its vibrant market area, Karama is a popular spot for shopping, particularly for souvenirs and traditional items. The Karama Commercial Center is a key shopping destination in this area.

6.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus Route 83 from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Al Khail Metro Seaside offers a scenic journey through the vibrant heart of Dubai. Departing from the bustling Ghubaiba Bus Station, you immediately dive into the city’s dynamic atmosphere, characterized by a mix of modern architecture and historical sites.

As the bus winds through the streets, passengers can enjoy views of the iconic Dubai Frame and the historic Al Fahidi neighborhood, where traditional wind-tower architecture tells tales of the past.

This bus ride not only provides convenient transport but also an engaging experience of Dubai’s diverse attractions and lively neighborhoods.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Al Khail Metro Seaside, the furthest point on Bus Route 83, starting from Ghubaiba Bus Station · 17. The journey offers a range of AED 94-114, providing a convenient way to reach this significant location. Enjoy a seamless travel experience with the option to book your ride easily through the app.

With this guide, navigating Bus Route 83 will be straightforward, ensuring that travelers can easily reach their destinations across Dubai’s dynamic urban landscape. The well-connected stops along the route offer convenient access to key areas, from bustling commercial hubs to cultural landmarks. Whether you’re commuting daily or exploring the city, this route provides a reliable and cost-effective travel option.

Official UAE Sources

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 11, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
